name: wFirma.pl
summary: Planned wFirma connector for invoice, contractor, goods and warehouse-document checks in marketplace accounting pilots.
description: Added because Marketing lists marketplace -> accounting as a concrete offer: verify that confirmed marketplace orders have invoices and KSeF traces. wFirma publishes API documentation with API key and OAuth options, modules such as invoices, contractors, goods, warehouses, warehouse_documents and KSeF-related workflows. This connector should start read-only and dry-run invoice draft creation.
useCases: Verify invoice coverage for BaseLinker confirmed orders.
Read contractors/goods to prepare accounting handoff.
Create invoice drafts only after approval.
requires: wFirma API key headers or OAuth credentials
verified company for OAuth 2.0 application where required
